revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:1月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 1월 18일]][[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:正月十八]][[zh:正月十八]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 18|qq=January 18}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=一月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 1월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}}, the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Ingyo|Emperor Ingyo]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|413|en|413|qid=Q31510|lt=413|1=413}} {{ill|March 6|en|March 6|qid=Q2399|lt=March 6|1=March 6}}) – The 19th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Ingyo|ja|允恭天皇?|1=Emperor Ingyō|2=ja|3=允恭天皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ingyo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q349258}} (check source) ascended the throne. * {{ill|Ōnin|en|Ōnin|qid=Q1143903|lt=Ōnin|1=Ōnin}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1467|en|1467|qid=Q6561|lt=1467|1=1467}} {{ill|February 22|en|February 22|qid=Q2351|lt=February 22|1=February 22}}) – {{ill|Hatakeyama Yoshinari|en|Hatakeyama Yoshinari|qid=Q11578676|lt=Hatakeyama Yoshinobu|1=Hatakeyama Yoshinari}} attacked the spirit house of the imperial ancestral shrine (上御霊社) at the site of {{ill|Hatakeyama Masanaga|en|Hatakeyama Masanaga|qid=Q5680891|lt=Hatakeyama Masanaga|1=Hatakeyama Masanaga}}, marking the beginning of the {{ill|Ōnin War|en|Ōnin War|qid=Q385676|lt=Ōnin War|1=Ōnin War}}. * {{ill|Meireki|en|Meireki|qid=Q1192766|lt=Meireki|1=Meireki}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1657|en|1657|qid=Q6987|lt=1657|1=1657}} {{ill|March 2|en|March 2|qid=Q2390|lt=March 2|1=March 2}}) – The great fire of Meireki (振袖火事) occurred.
== Births == * {{ill|Ninna|en|Ninna|qid=Q1346317|lt=Ninna|1=Ninna}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|885|en|885|qid=Q24894|lt=885|1=885}} {{ill|February 6|en|February 6|qid=Q2320|lt=February 6|1=February 6}}) – {{ill|Emperor Daigo|en|Emperor Daigo|qid=Q329753|lt=Emperor Daigo|1=Emperor Daigo}}, the 60th Emperor of Japan (died {{ill|930|en|930|qid=Q23409|lt=930|1=930}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|qid=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} {{ill|February 22|en|February 22|qid=Q2351|lt=February 22|1=February 22}}) – {{ill|Miyatake Gaikotsu|en|Miyatake Gaikotsu|qid=Q1497601|lt=Miyabuki Gaikotsu|1=Miyatake Gaikotsu}}, a scholar of Edo–Meiji culture (died {{ill|1955|en|1955|qid=Q18577|lt=1955|1=1955}}). * {{ill|1931|en|1931|qid=Q18782|lt=1931|1=1931}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1931|en|1931|qid=Q18782|lt=1931|1=1931}} {{ill|March 6|en|March 6|qid=Q2399|lt=March 6|1=March 6}}) – {{ill|Chun Doo-hwan|en|Chun Doo-hwan|qid=Q14362|lt=Chun Do Hwan|1=Chun Doo-hwan}}, a South Korean politician and the 11th/12th President of the Republic of Korea (died {{ill|2021|en|2021|qid=Q49628|lt=2021|1=2021}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kantoku|en|Kantoku|qid=Q1193536|lt=Kantoku|1=Kantoku}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1045|en|1045|qid=Q19351|lt=1045|1=1045}} {{ill|February 7|en|February 7|qid=Q2322|lt=February 7|1=February 7}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Suzaku|en|Emperor Go-Suzaku|qid=Q349296|lt=Go-Suzaku Tennō|1=Emperor Go-Suzaku}}, the 69th Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1009|en|1009|qid=Q19236|lt=1009|1=1009}}). * {{ill|Shōchō|en|Shōchō|qid=Q1193070|lt=Shōchō|1=Shōchō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1428|en|1428|qid=Q6315|lt=1428|1=1428}} {{ill|February 3|en|February 3|qid=Q2315|lt=February 3|1=February 3}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshimochi|en|Ashikaga Yoshimochi|qid=Q466287|lt=Ashikaga Yoshimochi|1=Ashikaga Yoshimochi}}, the 4th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born {{ill|1386|en|1386|qid=Q6355|lt=1386|1=1386}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1614|en|1614|qid=Q6781|lt=1614|1=1614}} {{ill|February 26|en|February 26|qid=Q2359|lt=February 26|1=February 26}}) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshiaki|en|Mogami Yoshiaki|qid=Q839377|lt=Mogami Yoshimitsu|1=Mogami Yoshiaki}}, the founding lord of the Yamagata Domain (born {{ill|1546|en|1546|qid=Q6533|lt=1546|1=1546}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji|1=Meiji era}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|March 8|en|March 8|qid=Q2395|lt=March 8|1=March 8}}) – {{ill|Nabeshima Naomasa|en|Nabeshima Naomasa|qid=Q3334677|lt=Nabeshima Naomasa|1=Nabeshima Naomasa}}, the lord of the Saga Domain (born {{ill|1815|en|1815|qid=Q6948|lt=1815|1=1815}}).
== Commemorations == * [[Gofune Matsuri]] – A festival held at 【Shōfuku-ji】 in Toba, Mie Prefecture, celebrating the mythical ferrying of the spirits.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|1|17|1|19|12|18|2|1|0118|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 1월 18일]] [[ja:1月18日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:正月十八]]
[[ar:January 18 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月十八]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月十八]] {{wikidata link|Q839131}} [[Category:Days 18 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar January]] [[Category:Shakkō]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
